label: Investment & Vacation
title: Investment Property & Vacation Home Mortgages in BC
metaTitle: Investment & Vacation Property Mortgages — BC Broker
metaDescription: Mortgages for investment properties, vacation homes, second properties and second mortgages in Greater Vancouver and across BC. Up to 80% LTV on rentals.
intro: Building a rental portfolio or buying a Whistler getaway has its own mortgage rulebook — and most of it doesn't get explained at your bank's main branch.
body:
Rental property financing in Canada caps at 80% loan-to-value federally — meaning at least 20% down on any rental purchase. Vacation and second-home financing for owner-use can go higher (up to 95% LTV in some cases) but only at properties that satisfy specific 'Type A' criteria: year-round road access, year-round residential use, full kitchen and bath, etc.

The four pages below cover the most common scenarios — buying your first rental, buying a Whistler or Okanagan getaway, taking out a second mortgage to fund the next purchase, and buying a second property as a family member's home.

highlights.title: Rental rental income offset
highlights.description: Many lenders count 50–100% of rental income against the new mortgage payment, dramatically improving qualification.

highlights.title: Vacation home Type A vs Type B
highlights.description: Type A vacation properties qualify for higher LTV; Type B (off-grid, season-only) require 25%+ down conventionally.

highlights.title: Second mortgages
highlights.description: Equity take-out without breaking the first — useful when the first mortgage has a low rate or large IRD penalty.
